scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend "npm run -w backend watch" "npm run -w frontend dev"
scripts.api:check-generated: npm run api:generate && git diff --exit-code -- frontend/src/Generated/Api
scripts.verify: npm run api:check-generated && npm run -w frontend test && npm run -w frontend review && npm run -w backend test && npm run book:build
scripts.predeploy: npm run verify && npm run aws:build:pages
